result.stdout:
.NET XML Document Transform

Usage: dotnet-xdt <arguments> [options]

Required arguments:
  --source|-s      Source XML file to transform
  --transform|-t   XDT transform file to apply
  --output|-o      Path where the output file will be written

Options:
  --help|-h|-?     Print usage information
  --verbose|-v     Print verbose messages while transforming

Example: dotnet-xdt --source original.xml --transform delta.xml --output final.xml --verbose
